heading: Restrictions
label: 80306 Restrictions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8030636:33 (words after 19th comma).(words after 19th comma), .Mar. 16, 1950, ch. 62, § 364 Stat. 23In subsection (a), the word “pecuniary” is omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b), the words “The corporation shall be” are substituted for “which purposes shall be” for clarity and consistency in the revised title.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8030636:33 (words after 19th comma).(words after 19th comma), .Mar. 16, 1950, ch. 62, § 364 Stat. 23In subsection (a), the word “pecuniary” is omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b), the words “The corporation shall be” are substituted for “which purposes shall be” for clarity and consistency in the revised title.

children.heading: .—Profit
children.label: a .—Profit
children.text: The corporation may not operate for profit.

children.heading: .—Political Activities
children.label: b .—Political Activities
children.text: The corporation shall be nonpolitical and nonsectarian.
